title: cymbidium triquetrum
intro: Cymbidium triquetrum, also known as the flat-leaved orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Southeast Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions due to its antiseptic properties. In traditional herbal preparations, Cymbidium triquetrum is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
